{{CargoRelic
|name=Learning Device
|class_id=20386
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=A new device developed by the Animal Taming Association. It is said to extract the training results of the wearer and provide them to other animals. However, due to a low conversion rate, it is currently impractical and can only be worn as a cute decorative item.
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 5 Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +1<br>Gene LVLs Researched: 500/500
|ss2=Per 5 Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Gene LVLs Researched: 500/500
|ss3=Per 5 Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +3<br>Gene LVLs Researched: 500/500
|ss4=Per 5 Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +3<br>Gene LVLs Researched: 500/500
|ss7=Per 5 Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +3<br>Gene LVLs Researched: 500/500<br> (Awakened)
}}
